title: MotorFeedback
description: Action outcome reported by motor-output back to executive-agent. Closes the spinocerebellar corollary-discharge feedback loop. Carries a RewardSignal-compatible dict for actor-critic credit assignment.

action_id.description: The ActionSpec.action_id this feedback corresponds to.

channel.description: The channel that dispatched this action.

predicted_outcome.description: The corollary discharge prediction from ActionSpec.predicted_outcome. Null if no prediction was made.

actual_outcome.description: The actual result returned by the dispatch channel.

deviation_score.description: Normalised deviation between predicted and actual outcome [0, 1]. 0 = perfect prediction; 1 = maximum deviation. Used by executive-agent to update goal priority weights.

success.description: True if the dispatch channel executed without error and the action completed successfully.

escalate.description: True if all three error-policy tiers were exhausted and the failure must be escalated to executive-agent BDI loop.

error.description: Error message if success=false. Null on success.

retry_count.description: Number of tier-1 retries attempted before this feedback was emitted.

dispatched_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the action was dispatched.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the action completed (success or failure).
